characters.appearance: Young adult male with a fair complexion and short, neatly styled brown hair. He has a clean-shaven face and an average build.
characters.wardrobe: A crisp white collared button-down shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलने में hesitation होती है, right? So watch, if I open Supernova, "Hey, can we practice a job interview conversation?" [You feel hesitation speaking English, right? So watch, if I open Supernova, "Hey, can we practice a job interview conversation?"]
Character A says: And AI tutor तुरंत reply करता है। Boom, real-time practice. I think probably about two to three times faster confidence build होता है than just reading books. [And the AI tutor replies instantly. Boom, real-time practice. I think confidence builds probably about two to three times faster than just reading books.]
Character A says: Plus, आप directly real-world situations, like shopping या office meetings, select कर सकते हो Supernova के अंदर। [Plus, you can directly select real-world situations, like shopping or office meetings, inside Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point (hesitation in speaking English).
- Demonstrates the core feature (AI voice practice) in real-time, mirroring the original ad's voice command beat.
- Establishes the value proposition of building confidence faster than traditional methods.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speak English with Confidence
English बोलने में hesitation होती है, right? So watch, if I open Supernova, "Hey, can we practice a job interview conversation?" And AI tutor तुरंत reply करता है। Boom, real-time practice. I think probably about two to three times faster confidence build होता है than just reading books. Plus, आप directly real-world situations, like shopping या office meetings, select कर सकते हो Supernova के अंदर।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: "Can you please check my pronunciation and suggest better words?" ["Can you please check my pronunciation and suggest better words?"]
Character A says: Okay. And wait a second here, and you can see that it automatically actually highlights my mistakes and gives the right context. So this is an AI feature that's built into Supernova. [Okay. And wait a second here, and you can see that it automatically actually highlights my mistakes and gives the right context. So this is an AI feature that's built into Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows a specific, practical use case (getting feedback on pronunciation and vocabulary).
- Highlights the app's intelligent feedback mechanism, replacing the original code-tagging feature.
- Ends with a strong feature reinforcement for the Supernova brand.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: "Can you please check my pronunciation and suggest better words?" Okay. And wait a second here, and you can see that it automatically actually highlights my mistakes and gives the right context. So this is an AI feature that's built into Supernova.
